# Accordion

Accordion is used to show and hide content in collapsible sections.

## Props

### Accordion

<PropsTable
  data={[
    {
      name: "name",
      type: "string",
      description:
        "Shared name attribute that groups accordions so only one can be open at a time. Auto-generated if omitted.",
    },
    {
      name: "icon",
      type: "'none' | 'arrow' | 'plus'",
      default: "'none'",
      description: "Icon variant to display on the trigger.",
    },
    {
      name: "defaultChecked",
      type: "boolean",
      description: "Opens this accordion item by default on initial render.",
    },
  ]}
/>
